title: Senior Backend Engineer

stack_mentions.source_text: Strong PostgreSQL skills, including schema design and query optimization, are also required.
Familiarity with Docker, AWS, Kubernetes, Redis, Kafka, Terraform, Prometheus, GraphQL, and React is helpful but not essential.
